name: echidna-llm-mcp
description: LLM advisor cartridge for the ECHIDNA formal verification engine. Provides free-form consultation (consult) and structured proof-tactic generation (suggest_tactics) by routing to Anthropic Claude via ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.

tools.name: consult
tools.description: Free-form Q&A with the LLM advisor. Accepts a natural-language question and optional proof-state context; returns a Markdown-formatted answer. Intended for /api/v1/consult calls from ECHIDNA.

context.description: Optional additional context (e.g. current proof state summary, recent job log).

model.description: Model hint: 'opus', 'sonnet', 'haiku', or a full Claude model ID. Defaults to claude-sonnet-4-6.

max_tokens.description: Maximum tokens in the LLM response.

tools.name: suggest_tactics
tools.description: Structured tactic generation for ECHIDNA proof search. The caller supplies a fully-formed system prompt (role + JSON schema) and user prompt (goal + hypotheses + history). Returns a TacticSuggestionResponse JSON with tactics, recommended_provers, decomposition, auxiliary_lemmas, and reasoning.

system.description: System prompt from echidna's build_system_prompt() — defines the advisor role and required JSON response schema.

prompt.description: User prompt from echidna's build_user_prompt() — encodes the proof goal, hypotheses, history, and top-k count.

model.description: Model hint: 'opus', 'sonnet', 'haiku', or a full Claude model ID. Defaults to claude-sonnet-4-6.

max_tokens.description: Maximum tokens in the LLM response.

temperature.description: Sampling temperature 0.0–1.0. Lower = more deterministic tactic suggestions.

response_format.description: Expected output format: 'json' (required for correct TacticSuggestionResponse parsing).
